title: Sālār heat wave
lead: A severe heat wave is affecting Sālār with a Z-Score of +5.57. The city is experiencing extremely high temperatures, with a Score of 10.0/10.
body:
The current heat wave in Sālār is causing significant concern, with a Z-Score of +5.57 indicating a major anomaly. 
 The temperature is extremely high, with a CDD of 18.5 GG, and humidity is at 48%, making the heat feel even more intense. 
 The wind speed is relatively low at 7.6 km/h, which is not providing much relief from the heat.
conclusion: Implement heat wave emergency protocols immediately.
